creative_direction.reasoning: Same card-in-frame layout as notion-ad-4 but with cool-blue canvas instead of warm yellow — the layout is a design-system template, color is the audience segmentation variable. Track B recommended for same reason as ad-4: surgical word-coloring on $12,000 and 'free' requires post-compositing.
creative_direction.concept_one_liner: Blue-canvas variant of the Notion card-in-frame template, tuned for enterprise/B2B audiences.

nano_banana_json.scene: Light blue canvas with a white rounded-rectangle card floating center, mimicking a Notion web page, with two ghosted offset cards behind it for depth. Card has Notion logo top-left, blue Get Started Free pill top-right, two-line Title Case headline, dollar-anchored offer line with color-highlighted words, AI Access pill CTA, and three overlapping Notion UI screenshot panels in the bottom third.

environment.canvas_background: #6BB8F0 soft cool blue (lighter than signature Notion blue — chosen to feel airy/calm rather than saturated)

composition.notes: IDENTICAL LAYOUT TO notion-ad-4 EXCEPT canvas color is cool blue. All card contents, UI strip, typography, and CTAs unchanged.
vertical_zones: Card top 15%: Notion logo left, Get Started Free blue pill right
Card center 25%: two-line Title Case ExtraBold headline 'Organize Everything. / Accomplish Anything.'
Card center 12%: offer line with surgical word-coloring
Card center 10%: AI Access pill CTA
Card bottom 33%: three overlapping Notion UI panels (Daily Report chart, Engineering Tasks table, Launch checklist kanban)

text_elements_in_image.content: Get up to $12,000 of free Notion
Free 3 Month Trial, Full AI Access ✦

negative_prompt: no saturated navy — canvas must be soft airy blue

prompt_track_B_background_only.description: Identical to notion-ad-4 Track B except canvas color swap. Generate blue canvas + white card + ghosted stack + product UI strip + top-right blue pill shell. Text overlaid in post.

nano_banana_json.scene: Flat-lay graphic: white rounded-corner card on a soft cool blue #6BB8F0 canvas, with two ghosted offset card silhouettes behind implying a stack. Card contains: Notion N logo + wordmark top-left, an empty blue #2D7FF9 pill button top-right, and three overlapping Notion UI screenshot panels in bottom 33% (Daily Report line chart, Engineering Tasks database table, Launch checklist kanban). Middle 50% of card is reserved blank white space for overlaid text.
negative_prompt: no baked-in text anywhere in card except the Notion wordmark + logo top-left

elements.content: Get up to $12,000 of free Notion
Free 3 Month Trial, Full AI Access ✦

assets.name: Notion product UI panels (same as notion-ad-4)

patterns_exemplified: DP-11 warm vs cool canvas segmentation
prompt_writer_training_notes: This ad + notion-ad-4 demonstrate the A/B color variant pattern — SAME LAYOUT, swap canvas color to target different audiences. When prompting: flag that these pair together and specify the canvas hex explicitly so image gen doesn't default to a generic blue. Avoid saturated navy (reads enterprise-stiff); the #6BB8F0 airy blue is deliberately soft.
